ingestion_queue.action: Locate or re-upload the two ChatGPT 7z exports and v9 prompt pack, preserving original bytes and SHA-256.
Safely extract all 4070 inventoried archive entries; finish compression folders 0 and 1 and log failures.
Generate full user and assistant message ledgers with conversation IDs, message IDs, timestamps, roles and hashes.
Classify full-content chats into projects, cross-links, ambiguous and unassigned review queues.
Rebuild and deduplicate the canonical requirements register and validate or supersede the 5407 claim.
Map every applicable requirement to the 16-domain, 128-family target catalog and preserve unmapped requirements.
Reconcile each module family against repositories, code, tests, deployment and runtime evidence.
Implement missing P0 registries, provenance graph, no-gaps verifier and Command Centre status surfaces.
Build agency and trading factories in sandbox and staging with lawful, cost, safety and independent proof gates.

completion_boundary: Complete for the currently inspected source references only. Full historical extraction, canonical requirement reconciliation and runtime verification remain incomplete.
